name: GIGABYTE B550M GAMING Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-5000(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - D-Sub - DVI-D - HDMI - Realtek GbE LAN - Q-Flash Plus Button
shortName: GIGABYTE B550M GAMING Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: Gigabyte B550M GAMING micro ATX motherboard with high DDR4 support for gaming in compact form factor.
